rows.label: qev085402_MSG0002
rows.name:
We were able to gather
some information, but—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085402_MSG0005
rows.name: The truth is, one of the Collepedians—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085402_MSG0005_2
rows.name:
...apparently spotted a cat that looked
like Aisha around Ganpeki no Hama.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085402_MSG0006
rows.name: Eh, she went outside of NLA?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085402_MSG0008
rows.name:
No wonder we couldn't find
her. I'll go pick her up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085402_MSG0009
rows.name: Thank you everyone for your cooperation![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085402_MSG0011
rows.name:
This is bad. That area has many
dangerous native creatures.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085402_MSG0012
rows.name:
We must hurry mo! It would be pitiful if
she got eaten by a native creature mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085402_MSG0013
rows.name:
Indeed. Since we've come this far, let's
see this through until we secure Aisha.[ST:wait ]
